currentStep.title: Entry Bridge With 24
currentStep.openingLine: Let's just find one easy way into the problem instead of solving everything at once.
currentStep.firstTutorQuestion: What is the easiest divisor you can test first?
currentStep.smallHint: If the number is even, checking 2 is a calm first step.
currentStep.goodStoppingPoint: Learner starts with 2 for 24 and explains that 24 is even.

nextStep.title: Rewrite the Final Factorization Cleanly
nextStep.openingLine: Your split-work is close; now let's turn it into one clean final factorization.
nextStep.firstTutorQuestion: Which factors should still remain in the final line?
nextStep.smallHint: Keep only prime factors in the last line, and make sure none were dropped.
nextStep.goodStoppingPoint: Learner writes one complete prime factorization with no missing or composite factor.
